debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ MaxDegreeLE (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM') 2

proof:
rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  have hll : (hM.restrict₂ hM').Loopless := instLooplessLoopRemove
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := by
        apply encard_le_encard
        intro e he
        have hinc : (G ↾ (M ∆ M')).Inc e v := Inc.of_le he (loopRemove_le _)
        rw [edgeRestrict_inc_iff] at hinc
        rcases hinc.2 with h | h
        · exact mem_union_left _ ⟨h.1, hinc.1⟩
        · exact mem_union_right _ ⟨h.1, hinc.1⟩
      _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
      _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
      _ = 2 := by norm_num
successful_attempts:
rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  have hll : (hM.restrict₂ hM').Loopless := instLooplessLoopRemove
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := by
        apply encard_le_encard
        intro e he
        have hinc : (G ↾ (M ∆ M')).Inc e v := Inc.of_le he (loopRemove_le _)
        rw [edgeRestrict_inc_iff] at hinc
        rcases hinc.2 with h | h
        · exact mem_union_left _ ⟨h.1, hinc.1⟩
        · exact mem_union_right _ ⟨h.1, hinc.1⟩
      _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
      _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
      _ = 2 := by norm_num
